title: Integrate persist_ssn success path and common wipe in oscore_protect_request
description: After successful OSCORE option build (around line 1520), call oscore_ctx_persist_ssn(ctx). On OSCORE_OK from it, set ret=OSCORE_OK and goto common cleanup/wipe. On NVM failure, goto the NVM error path. Ensure the plaintext buffer, nonce, etc. are wiped in all paths before returning. Update function docs in oscore.h.
close_reason: Integrated persist_ssn call on success path after option build with proper NVM error branching to nvm_failed label and common_wipe for sensitive data (nonce, piv, plaintext, seq). All error paths now ensure wipe before return. Updated oscore.h docs with security details and nvm_failed behavior. Test in test_nvm_protect_request_failure passes verifying SSN increment kept and no 'not initialized' error on retry. Verified with oscore test vectors.
